calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-24-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.

Dept. 514, Judge: Doanld J. Sullivan Clerk: S. Vantree, CSR: S. Wong #11288.
Petitioner MIAO QIONG CHEN, mother was present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for the minor XIAO LIN TAN.

Cantonese interpreter Jenny Yau and petiotioner was placed under oath and examined.

Minor's father YI XIONG TAN was not present, however the petitioner presented to the Court and was accepted by the Court, Proof of Service of Order to Show Cause served on the father 11-20-11.

Proof of Publication is in the file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minors to LANEY SI LIN CHEN.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
